title: lagenocarpus junciformis
intro: Lagenocarpus junciformis, also known as the cattail rush, is a species of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Rapateaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lagenocarpus junciformis include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves or roots in water, and it can also be used as a poultice or applied topically to affected areas.
